places.rationale: [DOC] Places API (New) supports search, autocomplete, details, photos, and place IDs; the skill plans only the fields needed for the use case.

geocoding.rationale: [DOC] Geocoding API converts addresses, coordinates, and place IDs into coordinates, place IDs, or human-readable addresses.

directions.rationale: [DOC] Directions API (Legacy) calculates routes using origins, destinations, waypoints, travel mode, travel time, distance, and turns.

privacy_controls: collect only fields required by the feature
redact raw addresses and precise coordinates from logs
store place IDs and normalized derived data where possible
ask for consent before precise user location collection
